tree.name: Anfernee Simons
tree.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Nikola Vucevic and a 2027 2nd round pick (DEN own) to Celtics for Anfernee Simons and a 2026 2nd round pick (more favorable). Boston also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Nikola Vucevic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Wendell Carter Jr., Otto Porter Jr., a 2021 1st round pick (Franz Wagner, #8) and a 2023 1st round pick (Jett Howard) to Magic for Nikola Vucevic and Al-Farouq Aminu. Orlando also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Wendell Carter Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 7th overall by Chicago Bulls from Duke in 2018 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Otto Porter Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Washington Wizards

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#8) via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2021 1st round pick, top-4 protected. Sent to ORL in Vucevic trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2023 1st round pick. Sent to ORL in Vucevic trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's 2027 2nd round pick, sent to BOS in Simons trade
